# JMAP Protocol — Section Index
# Source: .claude/llms/jmap/llms-full.txt (3894 lines)
# Condensed from RFC 8620 (JMAP Core) and RFC 8621 (JMAP Mail)

## RFC 8620: JMAP Core

### Data Types (§1.2–1.5)
- Id Data Type: line 7
- Int and UnsignedInt: line 40
- Date and UTCDate: line 49
- JSON Encoding: line 61

### Terminology (§1.6–1.7)
- User, Accounts, Data Types: line 74
- JMAP API Model: line 121
- Vendor Extensions: line 145

### Session Resource (§2)
- Session object fields: line 167
- Session example JSON: line 373
- Service Autodiscovery (.well-known/jmap): line 446

### Structured Data Exchange (§3)
- Making an API Request: line 472
- Invocation Data Type (3-element array): line 483
- Request Object: line 500
- Request Example: line 555
- Response Object: line 571
- Response Example: line 601
- Omitting Arguments: line 623

### Errors (§3.6)
- Request-Level Errors: line 659
- Request Error Example: line 686
- Method-Level Errors: line 707

### Result References (§3.7)
- References to Previous Method Results: line 784

### Standard Methods (§5)
- /get: line 1095
- /changes: line 1163
- /set: line 1315
- /copy: line 1597
- /query: line 1729
- /queryChanges: line 1979
- Examples: line 2130

### Binary Data (§6)
- Uploading: line 2474
- Downloading: line 2526
- Blob/copy: line 2559

### Push (§7)
- StateChange Object: line 2637
- PushSubscription: line 2696
- Event Source: line 3007

### Security (§8)
- Security Considerations: line 3081

## RFC 8621: JMAP Mail (appended after core)

### Capabilities
- urn:ietf:params:jmap:mail: starts after core section (~line 3240)

### Mailbox Entity Type
- Mailbox properties and methods: follows capabilities section
- Mailbox/get, /changes, /query, /queryChanges, /set
- Mailbox example: near end of appended section
